name: Bacardi Rum Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Package chocolate cake mix (2 layer size)
1 Jell-o chocolate instant pudding mix (4 servings)
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: 30 minutes
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Grease and flour two 9-inch layer cake pans.
Combine all cake ingredients in a large bowl. Blend well, then beat at medium speed for 2 minutes.
Turn batter into prepared pans.
Bake for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Do not overbake.
Cool in pans for 10 minutes. Remove from pans and let cool on racks completely.
Split layers horizontally. Spread one cup of filling between each layer and over the top of the cake. Stack. Keep the cake well chilled. Serve cold.
Filling:
Combine milk, rum, pudding mix, and topping mix in a deep, narrow bowl. Blend well at high speed for 4 minutes until light and fluffy. Makes 4 cups.
